chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-3993 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s)  For orders as to non-prosecution 29.01.2026 None present ********* None present for the petitioner. Similar has been the case from inception of the petition. Record reveals that no one has turned up to comply with the office objections giving reasons to believe that the petitioner is not interested to proceed with this petition. Accordingly, the same is hereby dismissed in non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
